name: Leuchtenbergia principis Fisch. ex Hook.
description: По данным GBIF (коллекция UNAM). Морфология и синонимы будут добавлены.
morphology_stem: Leuchtenbergia is a genus of cactus which has only one species, Leuchtenbergia principis. It is native to north-central Mexico. The genus is named after Maximilian Eugen Joseph (1817–1852), Duke of Leuchtenberg and amateur botanist.
